title: Spectrophotometric Determination of Lanthanides with Methyl Thymol Blue in presence of Micelle Forming Cationic Detergents
author: CHANDRASHEKHAR VEKHANDE
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemistry Department, Nagpur University, Nagpur 

  Manuscript received 25 November 1974 ; revised 4 April 1975 ; accepted 21 May 1975  

 Ternary Complex systems between lanthanides, methyl thymol blue and cetyl trimethyl ammonium bromide are proposed for the spectrophotometric determination of minute amounts of lanthanides. The blue complex [Ln (MT) (CTAB) 4 ] has an absorbance maximum at 640 nm. Sensitivity of the reaction ranges between 0.0031 to 0.0039  µ g/cm 2  for lighter and heavier series under the present conditions of study. The study includes the effect of  p H, effect of reagent concentration, complex formation and the analytical application of the systems viz. Beer's law, photometric ranges and effect of foreign ions.
